message:
feat: visual polish round 2 — TOC, tagline, featured badges, ask-me-about

- Update tagline to reflect Flywheel focus (not markets)
- Add table of contents with anchor links for navigation
- Add "Ask me about" topic badges (multi-agent, agentic coding, Rust CLI, etc.)
- Add 🔥 badges to top projects (LLM-Aided OCR, Your Source to Prompt, Claude Code Agent Farm, Fast Vector Similarity)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

The rendering substrate for CASS and other Rust TUI applications in the Flywheel. - 🗄️ **[FrankenSQLite](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite)** ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite?style=flat-square&label=⭐&color=yellow) — Clean-room Rust reimplementation of SQLite with MVCC page-level versioning and RaptorQ erasure codes. - 🖥️ **[FrankenTerm](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenterm)** ![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Dicklesworthstone/frankenterm?style=flat-square&label=⭐&color=yellow) — Terminal hypervisor for AI agent swarms with pattern detection and event-driven automation.
